item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan penekanan pada "collective interest" sebagai alasan untuk menekan hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that collective/social interests should often take priority, but by the final turn shifts into a balanced rights-protective position: collective welfare is legitimate only with equal basic rights. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and treats individual rights as non-negotiable, while acknowledging community well-being. Notable language artifacts: Agent B includes Chinese characters in an English turn ("集体利益"), and Agent A uses the English phrase "collective interest" in Indonesian turns.
